surface_verification.justification: B4.5 Tier-3 PR reviewer = CI tooling (a GitHub Actions workflow + an OpenRouter-backed CLI). No web/UI/app surface (project scope=library). The CLI's true end-to-end needs prod credentials (OPENROUTER_API_KEY) + a live external PR + gh auth = the Phase-2 manual smoke-tests (steps 5-6), out of scope for this iterate. Review logic is fully covered by 65 offline unit tests (F0) + a 5-probe OpenRouter JSON round-trip; the workflow tier contract is pinned by a 16-assertion snapshot test.

behaviors.behavior: AC5 redaction never logs the OpenRouter key
AC2 decision->exit-code mapping (approve/comment=0, block=1, else=2; non-string->2)
AC3 strict-JSON parse + parse-failure dumps redacted raw response, exit 2
AC4 diff>200k truncates and a partial review never auto-blocks (exit 0 + warning)
OpenRouter content extraction + HTTP/URL error wrapping to RuntimeError
gh diff/comment/review subprocess wrappers + exit handling (arg-list, no shell=True)
main() orchestration across all exit paths (AC1/2/3/4/5)
AC6/AC7 workflow tier contract + fork-guard + SHA-pin + run-shell-injection guard
prompt-injection inoculation present in reviewer system prompt (drift guard)
live OpenRouter API review of a real diff (real network, nondeterministic model)
behaviors.reason: needs a live OpenRouter key + the nondeterministic model response; the Phase-2 manual smoke-test (step 6)

behaviors.behavior: live gh post of comment/review state to a real PR
behaviors.reason: needs an authenticated GH_TOKEN against a real open PR, absent from local/CI; Phase-2 smoke-test (step 6)

behaviors.behavior: decide-job bash tier classification executing on a real GitHub runner
behaviors.reason: runs only inside GitHub Actions on a real PR event; structurally covered by the snapshot test, exercised by Phase-2 smoke-tests 5-6

behaviors.behavior: skipped review-job still passes the required PR-Review check green
behaviors.reason: GitHub-runtime branch-protection behavior; the spec's open question, verified by Phase-2 smoke-test 5
